title: temu
profTagline: Everything a dev would actually buy. A marketplace with a `dev mode` flag ON by default — every category is quietly the black-hoodie / ThinkPad / Flipper-Zero starter pack. Flip it off to see the junk the algorithm sells everyone else. Nothing's for sale; the checkout button just says commit & push.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
devSubOn: curated · what a dev actually buys
devSubOff: unfiltered · what the algorithm sells everyone
emptyStarredHint: tap the bookmark on any card
